gazette: General Directorate of Trade Research and Risk Assessment
title: Georgia will enforce the EURO-5 standard for passenger cars starting from January 1, 2024
bodyHtml:
According to the announcement made by the Prime Minister of Georgia after a cabinet meeting, it has been decided to enforce the EURO-5 standard for passenger cars starting from January 1, 2024, and for buses and trucks starting from January 1, 2025.

Sources:

https://www.gov.ge/news/359994?page=&year=

https://bm.ge/ka/video/saqartvelo-evro-5-is-standartis-shemogebas-gegmavs---ra-cvlilebebs-gamoiwvevs-reforma/41245/
